_meta.metric_note: Historical v4.1 benchmark figures are retained in the decision log for lineage. Current reviewer-facing pack summaries should cite pack.json/runtime metrics instead: LOO accuracy 0.6237 and kappa 0.1846.

decision_records.title: Organic Pathway Expert-Dominant
decision_records.summary: Organic pathway remains expert-dominant. DR-001 was reframed: PAH and PCB do not need to be co-located in the same samples for candidacy/search — each substance needs its own co-located conditions/effects evidence independently. Current code limitation: organic_contamination CPT fitting still requires both parents observed, so only 4 ALCAN station-events (1/9 configs) contribute to CPT learning.
decision_records.rationale: PCBs not routinely analyzed in BC sediment assessments. PAH-only and PCB-only stations can support candidacy and inference (marginalization), but the current organic_contamination CPT fitting code requires both sed_pahs and sed_pcbs observed at the same station. Only ALCAN yielded joint PAH+PCB data (4 stations, single config). 8/9 parent configurations remain unobserved for CPT learning.
decision_records.impact: Organic pathway CPTs (organic_contamination, organic_bioavail) remain expert-dominant. Noisy-OR Tier 1 threshold (n>=5 per config) not met; CPTs fall back to expert prior. PAH-only evidence supports inference via marginalization but does not expand CPT learning under current code.
decision_records.reopen_criteria: For CPT learning: >=10 station-events with both PAH and PCB observed, from >=2 sites, >=3/9 parent configurations, LOO validation gate. For candidacy/search: PAH-only or PCB-only sites are valid candidates independently (reframed, no co-location requirement).

decision_records.title: Woodfibre Level C Cross-Year Merge
decision_records.summary: 8 Woodfibre stations approved for cross-year merge (2006 chemistry + 2014 toxicity/community). 3 stations rejected (post-dredging contamination profile change).
decision_records.rationale: Stations SED06-103/104/105/111/114/116/118/119 had consistent contamination profiles across 2006-2014. Stations SED06-113/115/117 showed post-dredging changes.
decision_records.impact: Adds 8 effective training triads (36 native -> 44 effective). Rejected stations retained in DB for single-LoE reference.

decision_records.title: Dataset Freeze
decision_records.summary: Dataset frozen at 44 full triads / 82 co-located from 8 sites. Historical 82-station v4.1 soft-evidence benchmarking confirmed the lineage plateau (+19 stations, n=63->82) at accuracy 0.524 and kappa 0.207. Current reviewer-facing pack summaries use the refreshed pack metadata instead: accuracy 0.6237, kappa 0.1846.
decision_records.rationale: The historical 82-station benchmark showed that the bottleneck was expert prior shape and configuration diversity (Tier 3 at 1/9 configs), not data volume. The refreshed v1.0 pack summary uses a different current export surface, so the older v4.1 benchmark should be treated as lineage context rather than the headline reviewer metric.
decision_records.impact: No further BC site extraction. Reviewers should cite pack.json/runtime metrics for current pack summaries and use the retained v4.1 benchmark only to explain lineage and tradeoffs.
decision_records.reopen_criteria: Novel contamination profile site identified, or expert prior recalibration unlocks accuracy gains benefiting from additional data.

known_limitations.title: Moderate recall = 0.250
known_limitations.description: Historical 82-station benchmark context: only 8/82 co-located samples were moderate-risk. In that v4.1 lineage artifact, recall improved to 25% (2/8) from 12.5% (v4.0) and 0% (v3). The class-rarity limitation remains structural.
known_limitations.mitigation: Acceptable for screening tool (moderate predicted as high = conservative). Not suitable for balanced classification.

known_limitations.title: Organic pathway expert-dominant
known_limitations.description: Organic pathway expert-dominant. DR-001 reframed: PAH and PCB do not need co-location for candidacy/search. Current code limitation: organic_contamination CPT fitting requires both parents observed — only 4 ALCAN station-events (1/9 configs) contribute to CPT learning. Not entirely expert-elicited, but expert-dominant.
known_limitations.mitigation: Metal pathway claims are in-scope (49 BDeu obs across 12/36 configs). Organic pathway claims are out-of-scope for data-supported inference.

known_limitations.title: Conservative over-prediction (FP rate ~51%)
known_limitations.description: Historical 82-station benchmark context: 29/57 low-risk stations were predicted as non-low in the v4.1 lineage artifact, up from 25/57 in v4.0. That screening-conservative tradeoff improved high-risk recall (76.5%) and benchmark kappa (0.207) at the cost of additional low-risk false positives.
known_limitations.mitigation: Acceptable for regulatory screening (false positive = conservative). High recall (76.5%) means true high-risk sites are rarely missed. Tradeoff is by design.

known_limitations.title: Performance plateau
known_limitations.description: Historical lineage context: adding 19 stations (n=63->82) produced an accuracy/kappa plateau at v3 architecture. v4.0 broke that plateau (accuracy 0.549, kappa 0.180), and v4.1 further improved benchmark screening metrics (kappa 0.207, high recall 0.765) via inference enhancement rather than additional data.
known_limitations.mitigation: Bottleneck is prior shape and config diversity, not data volume. Dataset frozen (DR-003).

known_limitations.title: BC-only geographic scope
known_limitations.description: All 8 training sites are in British Columbia. Model applicability to other jurisdictions is unvalidated.
known_limitations.mitigation: Intended use is BC contaminated sites regulatory screening only.

known_limitations.title: Tier 3 config diversity (1/9)
known_limitations.description: Effect nodes (tox_amphipod, taxa_richness) observe only 1 of 9 possible parent configurations. Limits generalization.
known_limitations.mitigation: Expert priors fill unobserved configurations. Additional config diversity requires novel contamination profiles.

issue_summary.note: See BNRRM_HANDOFF.md Active Issues table for full details.
